query: /* select#1 */ select `testdb`.`products`.`id` AS `id`,`testdb`.`products`.`name` AS `name`,`testdb`.`products`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`testdb`.`products`.`price` AS `price`,`testdb`.`products`.`stock` AS `stock`,`testdb`.`products`.`created_at` AS `created_at` from `testdb`.`products`
